headline: The Power Plant Signal Hiding Inside Caterpillar Stock
summary: The real story behind the earthmoving giant’s doubled stock price emerged from a record-setting order book for a very different kind of machine.

headline: Citigroup Maintains Buy on Cummins, Raises Price Target to $790
summary: Citigroup  analyst Kyle Menges   maintains Cummins (NYSE:CMI) with a Buy and raises the price target from $770 to $790.

headline: Copper Zeolite SCR Catalyst Market Report Published, Profiles BASF SE, Cummins Inc., and 18 Other Industry Leaders
summary: Key market opportunities for copper zeolite SCR catalysts include rising adoption of ultra-low emission diesel engines, growing use in heavy-duty vehicles, increasing industrial NOx reduction applications, and expanding markets in Asia-Pacific due to industrialization and environmental concerns. headline: Cummins (CMI) Could Be 11% Undervalued As It Lifts Its Dividend Again
summary: Dividend increase puts Cummins in focus for income oriented investors Cummins (CMI) has drawn fresh attention after its Board approved a 10% lift in the quarterly dividend, raising the payout from $2.00 to $2.20 per share for upcoming distributions. See our latest analysis for Cummins. At a share price of $664.39, Cummins has slipped about 1.7% over the past day and 2% over the past week. Its year-to-date share price return of 27.3% and 1-year total shareholder return of 98.4% point to strong...
